attacking_style: Breakaway specialist who commits early on mountain stages, capable of sustaining efforts to summit finishes even as peloton reduces behind.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team tactics pattern - appears to operate with autonomy in breakaways rather than supported attacks.
terrain_preference: Summit finishes on Grand Tour mountain stages where sustained climbing power can be leveraged over 8+ km final climbs. Excels when GC favorites implode.
vulnerability: Unknown - limited observations prevent identifying weakness patterns. Single data point suggests opportunistic rather than consistently dominant.
key_patterns: Targets stage wins via early breakaways on mountain stages rather than GC ambitions
Capable of holding off reduced peloton on long summit finishes (8km+ climbs)
Historically underestimated climber who performs above expectations at Grand Tour level
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation from 2020 provides insufficient recent data to assess current trajectory
